apt_metadata.description:
.NET command and control framework
This package contains Covenant:  .NET command and control framework that aims
to highlight the attack surface of .NET, make the use of offensive .NET
tradecraft easier, and serve as a collaborative command and control platform
for red teamers.
.
Covenant is an ASP.NET Core, cross-platform application that includes a
web-based interface that allows for multi-user collaboration.

use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use covenant-kbx because ### covenant-kbx.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `covenant-kbx start|stop` as documented upstream for covenant-kbx.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair covenant-kbx with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `covenant-kbx --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
